name: MA1 PLUS
subtitle: The Ultimate Sideloading Experience.
description: A premium, hand-curated AltStore repository offering the latest emulators, tweaked media clients, and essential iOS utilities, updated regularly for the best sideloading experience.

apps.name: uYouPlus
apps.subtitle: Enhanced YouTube with uYou & Extra Tweaks
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube enhanced with the uYou tweak and additional modifications. Features include:

• Complete ad blocking (video, banner, and native ads)
• Background playback and Picture-in-Picture mode
• Video and audio downloading in multiple formats
• SponsorBlock integration to skip sponsored segments
• Custom playback speed controls
• Return YouTube Dislike integration
• OLED dark mode and interface customization
• Age restriction bypass
• Cast to external devices without Premium

Built and maintained by qnblackcat with contributions from the open-source community.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated to YouTube v19.25.3
• Updated uYou to v3.0.4
• Fixed ad blocking for new ad formats
• Updated SponsorBlock integration
• Fixed background playback on iOS 17.4+
• Performance and stability improvements

apps.name: BHTwitter
apps.subtitle: Twitter/X with Advanced Enhancements
apps.localizedDescription:
Twitter/X enhanced with BHTwitter tweak. Unlock powerful features not available in the stock app:

• Download videos, GIFs, and images natively
• Undo tweets before they go live
• Custom font selection and sizing
• Reader mode for long threads
• Hide promoted tweets and trends
• Force chronological timeline
• Custom app icons and themes
• Disable tweet character limit warnings
• Enhanced media viewer

Developed by BandarHL with a focus on user customization and privacy.
apps.versionDescription:
• Fixed video and GIF downloads
• Updated to latest Twitter/X SDK
• Added new customization options for tabs
• Improved reader mode formatting
• Fixed crash when viewing certain profiles
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: Rocket for Instagram
apps.subtitle: Instagram Supercharged with Rocket
apps.localizedDescription:
Instagram enhanced with Rocket tweak for power users:

• Download photos, videos, stories, and reels
• Repost content with one tap
• View full-resolution profile pictures
• Disable read receipts for DMs
• Disable typing indicators
• Save stories anonymously
• Grid layout customization
• Confirm actions before liking/following
• Block sponsored posts and suggestions
• In-app browser blocker

Originally created by Majd Alfhaily (alfhaily).
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated for latest Instagram release
• Fixed media saving for reels
• Improved story downloading reliability
• Fixed profile picture viewer
• Minor UI and stability fixes

apps.name: Watusi for WhatsApp
apps.subtitle: WhatsApp with Watusi Privacy & Customization
apps.localizedDescription:
WhatsApp enhanced with the Watusi tweak for maximum privacy and customization:

• Anti-revoke: read deleted messages
• Custom privacy settings per contact
• Message scheduler and auto-reply
• Custom themes and UI modifications
• Send media without compression
• Disable forwarded tag
• Hide online status and last seen
• Freeze last seen at a specific time
• Save statuses directly to camera roll
• Password-protect specific chats

Developed by FouadRaheb with continuous updates for WhatsApp compatibility.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated base to WhatsApp 2.24.8
• Fixed anti-revoke for group messages
• New custom theme engine with dark mode variants
• Improved message scheduler reliability
• Fixed media sending without compression
• Performance improvements

apps.name: Spotilife
apps.subtitle: Spotify with Premium Features Unlocked
apps.localizedDescription:
Spotify enhanced with the Spotilife tweak. Enjoy premium-tier features:

• Unlimited skips on any playlist or station
• No audio or banner advertisements
• Extreme audio quality (320kbps)
• Enable on-demand playback for free accounts
• Import and play local files
• Canvas art and lyrics display
• Unlimited streaming with no shuffle restrictions
• Full playlist and queue management

Note: Some features like offline downloads require a genuine Premium subscription.

Developed by julioverne.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated to Spotify 8.9.32 base
• Fixed streaming quality selector
• Improved ad-blocking for new ad formats
• Fixed Canvas art not displaying
• Stability and performance fixes

apps.name: Delta
apps.subtitle: All-in-One Classic Game Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
Delta is the premier all-in-one classic video game emulator for iOS. Play retro games from multiple systems with a beautiful, intuitive interface:

• Supported Systems: NES, SNES, N64, GB, GBC, GBA, DS, Sega Genesis/Mega Drive
• Save states with screenshot previews
• Fast forward and slow motion
• Cheat code support (Game Genie, Action Replay, GameShark)
• Hold button for rapid fire
• Custom controller skins
• MFi and Bluetooth controller support
• Dropbox, Google Drive, and iCloud sync
• Local multiplayer via controller support

Created by Riley Testut and the AltStore team.
apps.versionDescription:
• Added DS rumble feedback support
• Improved N64 rendering accuracy
• Fixed save state corruption on iOS 17.5
• Added new default controller skins
• Improved Dropbox sync reliability
• Performance optimizations for older devices

apps.name: Provenance
apps.subtitle: Multi-System Retro Game Frontend
apps.localizedDescription:
Provenance is a powerful multi-emulator frontend supporting a massive library of classic gaming systems:

• Atari 2600, 5200, 7800, Jaguar, Lynx
• Bandai WonderSwan / WonderSwan Color
• NEC TurboGrafx-16 / PC Engine, SuperGrafx
• Nintendo NES, Famicom, SNES, N64, GB, GBC, GBA, DS, Virtual Boy
• Sega Master System, Genesis/Mega Drive, CD, 32X, Game Gear, Saturn
• SNK Neo Geo Pocket / Neo Geo Pocket Color
• Sony PlayStation 1

Features automatic ROM scanning, cover art matching, save states, controller support, and a gorgeous library interface.

Open-source and community-driven.
apps.versionDescription:
• Added Saturn emulation core (Mednafen)
• Improved controller mapping interface
• Fixed audio sync issues on Apple A17 Pro
• New cover art scraping engine
• UI improvements for iPad layouts
• Better iCloud save sync

apps.name: RetroArch
apps.subtitle: Universal Emulator & Media Frontend
apps.localizedDescription:
RetroArch is the reference frontend for the libretro API, providing a unified interface to dozens of emulator cores and media engines:

• 50+ emulator cores supporting nearly every retro platform
• Advanced shader support (CRT, scanlines, xBR scaling)
• Netplay for online multiplayer
• Comprehensive input configuration
• Achievement system (RetroAchievements integration)
• Run-ahead latency reduction
• Recording and streaming capabilities
• Automatic ROM scanning and playlist management
• Metal GPU renderer for iOS

The most versatile emulation platform available, maintained by the Libretro community.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated multiple cores to latest versions
• Improved Metal renderer performance
• Fixed touch input latency on iOS 17+
• Added new CRT shader variants
• Improved RetroAchievements integration
• Better MFi controller handling

apps.name: PPSSPP
apps.subtitle: PlayStation Portable Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
PPSSPP is the leading open-source PSP emulator, providing near-perfect compatibility with the PlayStation Portable library:

• HD rendering up to 10x native PSP resolution
• Vulkan and OpenGL ES rendering backends
• Save states and fast forward
• Texture upscaling and filtering
• Post-processing shader effects
• MFi and Bluetooth controller support
• Customizable on-screen touch controls
• Network (ad-hoc) multiplayer
• ISO and CSO format support
• Per-game settings for optimal performance

Created and maintained by Henrik Rydgård (hrydgard).
apps.versionDescription:
• Vulkan rendering improvements on A-series chips
• Fixed compatibility with 20+ previously broken titles
• Better on-screen touch control customization
• Improved texture cache management
• Fixed network multiplayer discovery
• Performance optimizations for Apple Silicon

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Full System Emulator & Virtual Machine
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM is a full-featured system emulator and virtual machine host for iOS and iPadOS, powered by QEMU:

• Run Windows, Linux, macOS, and other x86/ARM operating systems
• Hardware-accelerated virtualization on supported devices
• VGA, console, and serial display modes
• USB device passthrough
• Shared directories between host and guest
• Network configuration (bridged, shared, host-only)
• Snapshot and save/restore VM states
• Clipboard sharing with guest OS
• Built-in SPICE client for remote displays
• Import and export VM configurations

Developed by osy as an open-source project.
apps.versionDescription:
• Improved QEMU 8.2 backend integration
• Better Windows 11 guest support
• Fixed USB passthrough on iOS 17.4+
• Memory management improvements for large VMs
• Added UEFI Secure Boot support
• Improved network adapter performance

apps.name: DolphiniOS
apps.subtitle: Nintendo GameCube & Wii Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
DolphiniOS is the iOS port of the Dolphin Emulator, bringing Nintendo GameCube and Wii gaming to your iPhone and iPad:

• High compatibility with GameCube and Wii libraries
• JIT recompiler for near-native performance
• Internal resolution upscaling
• Wii Remote emulation using device motion sensors
• MFi and Bluetooth controller support
• Save states and memory card management
• Customizable on-screen controls
• Graphics enhancements and anti-aliasing
• Game-specific settings profiles

Ported and maintained by OatmealDome based on the Dolphin project.
apps.versionDescription:
• Improved JIT support for A15+ chipsets
• Fixed audio stuttering in Wii titles
• Better Wii Remote emulation accuracy
• Fixed rendering in select GameCube titles
• Stability improvements and crash fixes

apps.name: Cowabunga
apps.subtitle: iOS Customization Toolbox
apps.localizedDescription:
Cowabunga is a comprehensive iOS customization tool that leverages various exploits to modify system appearance without a jailbreak:

• Custom status bar icons and carrier text
• Lock screen and home screen modifications
• Custom system themes and icon theming
• Modify Control Center modules
• Change system fonts
• Custom dock and folder appearance
• Springboard layout customization
• Passcode key customization
• Disable OTA update badge
• Export and import theme configurations

Created by lemin (leminlimez) with community contributions.
apps.versionDescription:
• Added new pre-made themes
• Fixed iOS 17.4 compatibility
• Improved status bar customization
• New icon theming engine
• Fixed theme import/export
• Stability improvements

apps.name: LiveContainer
apps.subtitle: Run Apps Without Sideload Limits
apps.localizedDescription:
LiveContainer allows you to run multiple sideloaded apps within a single container, effectively bypassing the 3-app sideloading limit on non-jailbroken devices:

• Run unlimited apps from a single sideloaded container
• No need to re-sign individual apps
• JIT activation support for emulators
• App data isolation between contained apps
• Import IPA files directly on-device
• Lightweight container with minimal overhead
• Supports most standard iOS applications
• Quick app switching within the container

Developed by khanhduytran0 as an open-source project.
apps.versionDescription:
• Expanded app compatibility
• Improved JIT activation reliability
• Fixed crash on launch for specific apps
• Better memory management for contained apps
• Added app data backup/restore
• UI improvements

apps.name: Esign
apps.subtitle: On-Device IPA Signing Utility
apps.localizedDescription:
Esign is a powerful on-device IPA signing and installation utility for iOS:

• Sign IPA files directly on your device
• Import p12 certificates and provisioning profiles
• Modify app bundle identifiers and display names
• Inject dylibs and frameworks into IPA files
• Remove app restrictions and entitlements
• Built-in IPA file manager
• Support for multiple signing certificates
• App icon customization before installation
• URL scheme import support
• Batch signing capabilities

An essential tool for the iOS sideloading community.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated signing engine for iOS 17.5 compatibility
• Added certificate chain validation
• Improved IPA import from Files app
• Fixed dylib injection edge cases
• New certificate management interface
• Bug fixes and UI improvements

apps.name: Enmity
apps.subtitle: Discord with Themes & Plugins
apps.localizedDescription:
Discord enhanced with the Enmity modification framework. Transform your Discord experience:

• Install custom themes with live preview
• Plugin system for extending functionality
• Custom CSS injection
• Enhanced notification controls
• Custom font support
• Message formatting enhancements
• Built-in theme and plugin browser
• Developer tools for creating extensions
• Settings backup and sync
• Compatible with most Discord features

Built by the Enmity Team as an open-source project.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated to latest Discord base
• Fixed plugin loading on iOS 17+
• New theme engine with better CSS support
• Improved plugin API
• Fixed notification handling
• Stability improvements

apps.name: FilzaEscaped
apps.subtitle: Advanced Root Filesystem Manager
apps.localizedDescription:
Filza is the most advanced file manager for iOS, providing deep filesystem access through exploit-based techniques:

• Full root filesystem browsing
• Built-in text, hex, plist, and SQLite editors
• Media player for audio and video files
• Image viewer with metadata inspection
• WebDAV server for wireless file transfer
• Archive creation and extraction (ZIP, TAR, GZ)
• File permission and ownership management
• Batch file operations
• Bookmarks for frequently accessed paths
• Terminal emulator

Developed by TIGI Software, the gold standard of iOS file managers.
apps.versionDescription:
• iOS 17 exploit chain support
• Redesigned file browser interface
• New built-in code editor with syntax highlighting
• Improved WebDAV transfer speeds
• Fixed archive extraction for large files
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: AppStore++
apps.subtitle: Downgrade Any App Store App
apps.localizedDescription:
AppStore++ allows you to downgrade or upgrade any application from the App Store to any previously released version:

• View complete version history of any app
• Downgrade to any previous version
• Block automatic app updates
• Version comparison with changelogs
• Compatible with sideloading environments
• Useful for reverting unwanted UI changes
• Find versions compatible with older iOS
• One-tap version installation

Developed by CokePokes, an essential utility for maintaining app compatibility.
apps.versionDescription:
• Fixed iOS 17 compatibility
• Improved version history fetching speed
• Better UI with version comparison
• Fixed installation on non-jailbroken devices
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: Santander
apps.subtitle: Modern SwiftUI File Browser
apps.localizedDescription:
Santander is a modern, SwiftUI-based file manager and browser built for iOS:

• Clean, native iOS design language
• Browse application containers and documents
• Built-in plist viewer and editor
• Image and media preview
• File sharing via AirDrop and share sheet
• Quick Look integration for document preview
• Search across the filesystem
• Favorites and recent files
• File metadata and attributes inspector
• Dark mode and accessibility support

Developed by SerenaKit as an open-source project.
apps.versionDescription:
• Refreshed SwiftUI interface
• Improved filesystem navigation performance
• Added file preview for more formats
• Fixed permission handling on iOS 17
• Better search functionality
• Minor UI polish

apps.name: Cercube for YouTube
apps.subtitle: YouTube with Cercube Ad-Blocking & Downloads
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube enhanced with the Cercube tweak for a premium viewing experience:

• Block all video, banner, and native advertisements
• Download videos in multiple resolutions and formats (MP4, MP3)
• Background audio and video playback
• Picture-in-Picture mode
• Built-in download manager with queue
• Adjustable playback speed (0.5x to 2x)
• Disable age restrictions
• Auto-replay videos and playlists
• Export downloads to camera roll or Files app
• Shorts blocking option

Created by Majd Alfhaily with regular updates for YouTube compatibility.
apps.versionDescription:
• Updated for latest YouTube release
• Fixed download manager for new video formats
• Improved ad-blocking engine
• Added new download quality options (4K)
• Fixed PiP activation
• Performance and stability fixes

apps.name: iGameGod
apps.subtitle: iOS Game Cheating Engine
apps.localizedDescription:
iGameGod is a comprehensive game modification tool for iOS, providing powerful cheating capabilities:

• Speed Hack: Modify game speed (slow motion or fast forward)
• Value Scanner: Search and modify in-memory game values
• Auto Touch: Record and replay touch sequences
• Pointer Scanner: Find static addresses for stable cheats
• Floating toolbar for easy in-game access
• Supports both 32-bit and 64-bit games
• Save and load cheat profiles per game
• Hex editor for advanced memory editing
• Game-specific cheat tables from the community
• Touch recording macros

Developed by the iOSGods community.
apps.versionDescription:
• Added support for new game engines (Unity 2023, Unreal 5)
• Improved value scanner accuracy
• Fixed speed hack on iOS 17
• Better floating toolbar positioning
• New cheat table format support
• Stability and compatibility improvements

news.title: Welcome to MA1 PLUS
news.caption: The ultimate premium sideloading repository has arrived. Explore our curated collection of emulators, tweaked apps, and iOS utilities.

news.title: Delta 1.6.1 — DS Rumble & N64 Fixes
news.caption: The latest Delta update brings DS rumble feedback support, improved N64 rendering accuracy, and save state reliability fixes.

news.title: UTM 4.5.4 — Windows 11 & USB Fixes
news.caption: UTM has been updated with improved Windows 11 guest support, UEFI Secure Boot, and USB passthrough fixes for iOS 17.4+.

news.title: uYouPlus Updated to YouTube 19.25.3
news.caption: uYouPlus has been updated to YouTube v19.25.3 with uYou v3.0.4. Fixes ad blocking for new ad formats and background playback on iOS 17.4+.

news.title: LiveContainer 2.1 — More Apps, Better JIT
news.caption: LiveContainer v2.1 expands app compatibility, improves JIT activation, and adds app data backup and restore functionality.

news.title: Repository Update — 20 Apps & Growing
news.caption: MA1 PLUS now features 20 hand-curated applications across emulators, tweaked media apps, and system utilities. More coming soon!
